---
title: "What's more important for a Formula 1 driver: the car or the driver?"
description: "A data-driven analysis of the relative importance of the driver and the car in Formula 1 racing."
date: 2026-06-05
categories: [random]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    fig-dpi: 300
    lightbox: true
---


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-summary="R setup"}
# packages
library(tidyverse)
```
:::


## Context

## Reading and processing data


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-summary="Read and process data"}
results <- read.csv("results.csv")
drivers <- read.csv("drivers.csv")
constructors <- read.csv("constructors.csv")
races <- read.csv("races.csv")

# results modified
results <- results |>
  as_tibble() |>
  left_join(drivers, by = "driverId") |>
  left_join(constructors, by = "constructorId") |>
  left_join(races, by = "raceId") |>
  mutate(
    driver = paste(forename, surname, sep = "_")
  ) |>
  select(
    grid, position, driver, constructorRef, year, name.y
  ) |>
  mutate(
    position = as.numeric(position),
    position = ifelse(is.na(position), 25, position),
    position = ifelse(position > 25, 25, position)
  ) |>
  rename(
    grid_position = grid,
    final_position = position,
    constructor = constructorRef,
    year = year,
    circuit = name.y
  ) |>
  filter(year > 1990)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
ℹ In argument: `position = as.numeric(position)`.
Caused by warning:
! NAs introduced by coercion
```


:::
:::


### To the point, get to the damn


::: {.cell fig-aling='center'}

```{.r .cell-code}
results_by_driver <- results |>
  group_by(constructor, year, circuit) |>
  mutate(
    final_position = ifelse(final_position == "R", NA, final_position),
    grid_position_median = median(as.numeric(grid_position), na.rm = TRUE),
    final_position_median = median(as.numeric(final_position), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    grid_position_diff = -1 * (as.numeric(grid_position) - grid_position_median),
    final_position_diff = -1 * (as.numeric(final_position) - final_position_median)
  ) |>
  group_by(driver) |>
  summarise(
    n_races = n(),
    grid_position_diff_mean = mean(grid_position_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    grid_position_diff_sd = sd(grid_position_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    final_position_diff_mean = mean(final_position_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    final_position_diff_sd = sd(final_position_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.nan(final_position_diff_mean)) |>
  filter(n_races >= 30)

results_by_driver |>
  arrange(desc(final_position_diff_mean)) |>
  ggplot(aes(y = reorder(driver, final_position_diff_mean), x = final_position_diff_mean)) +
  geom_pointrange(
    aes(
      xmin = final_position_diff_mean - final_position_diff_sd,
      xmax = final_position_diff_mean + final_position_diff_sd
    ),
    size = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
    panel.grid.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Average difference in race final position compared to\nthe median final position of the team",
    subtitle = "From 1991 to 2025, only drivers\nwith at least 30 races are included"
  )
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}
